narrative:
Middlefield Twp township has 1,401 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
